renderable_elements.text: The Developer Experience You Actually Deserve.

DX-WWW is the web framework and launch stack for DX: a Rust-first runtime, dx-style design system, dx-forge package workflow, dx-check quality gates, local AI, browser automation, and automation-ready workflows.
Rust-first DX-WWW runtime with dx-style and no template node_modules
dx-forge packages, provider freedom, and automation-ready workflows
dx-check, RLM, and serializer receipts for measurable launch proof
Game-Changing Features That Set DX Apart
Every feature is designed to go viral. This is not incremental; it is a paradigm shift.
Unlimited Free Storage for Every Media Type
Video to YouTube, images to Pinterest, audio to SoundCloud, 3D to Sketchfab, code to Git providers.
AI That Acts Autonomously Without Compromising Safety
Green auto-execute, Yellow warn, Red backup-then-execute, with hashes, firewall, and VPN posture.
500-Point Anime Rank System for Every Project
F to SSSSS rank, security scanner, code linter, media linter, and full audit reports.
5,000+ Fonts, 1M+ Icons, 20+ Providers, Built-In Asset Tools
Fetch from Unsplash, Pexels, YouTube, Vimeo, Spotify, Sketchfab, then transform, version, and collaborate.
9+ Native Platforms, Every Browser, Every IDE, Every Creative Tool
macOS, Windows, Linux, Android, iOS, ChromeOS, watchOS, tvOS, remote web console, and extensions.
Any Model. Any Provider. Even Offline.
More providers than any competitor, unlimited local models, and hybrid cloud/offline switching.
A single runtime for local speed, provider freedom, and production workflows.

Traffic Security: Green / Yellow / Red

Your AI agent stays autonomous and safe.

GreenAuto-executes harmless actions.

Optimized for zero-friction flow when the operation is safe.

YellowExecutes with warnings or silent notifications.

Keeps velocity high while signaling medium-risk operations clearly.

RedExecutes with high-visibility warnings plus safety backup.

For destructive operations, DX creates a backup snapshot before changes.

Security Step 2

Apply Green, Yellow, or Red execution policy.

Create safety snapshot on high-risk operations.
